executionLogs.decision: Initialize Genomad project with Next.js, Drizzle ORM, and Foundry for smart contracts
Implement GenomadNFT with ERC-721 base and genetic traits system
Implement ZK trait verification using RISC Zero compatible interface
executionLogs.verification: ZK circuits compiled, verifier contract deployed

executionLogs.decision: Implement breeding factory with multi-owner custody division
executionLogs.verification: Breeding creates child with 50/50 custody split between parents

executionLogs.decision: Upgrade GenomadNFT to ERC-8004 Identity Registry compliance
executionLogs.verification: Contract compiles with ERC-8004 functions: setAgentURI, getMetadata, setMetadata, setAgentWallet

executionLogs.decision: Migrate from Monad testnet to Base mainnet for Synthesis hackathon
executionLogs.verification: All chain references updated to Base (chainId: 8453)

safetyChecks.implementation: hasCustody modifier with basis points check

safetyChecks.description: setAgentWallet requires EIP-712 signature from new wallet
